name: Year of the Dragon Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef top round steak, cut
1 large Red bell pepper, cut into strips
1 pack (6 oz) frozen peas and carrots, thawed and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice steak across the grain into 1/8-inch strips.
2. Coat a 1 1/2 quart rectangular dish with oil; evenly layer beef strips and garlic on the bottom.
3. Cover with waxed paper.
4. Microwave for 6 to 8 minutes at 50% (medium) power, or until meat is brown.
5. Pour off drippings if necessary.
6. Combine broth, cornstarch, and soy sauce; add ginger to beef. Stir halfway through cooking and microwave on high for 4 minutes.
7. Stir in red pepper strips. Microwave every 2 minutes for 4 to 6 minutes, or until sauce thickens and boils.
8. Stir in pea pods. Microwave for 2 to 3 minutes at high power, or until heated through.
9. Arrange salad savoy around the outer edge of a platter.
10. Place rice in the center of the platter and spoon beef mixture over it.
11. Makes 4 servings.
